description_public: A polygenic estimate related to caffeine metabolism speed variation in the general population.

AA.notes: This genotype is associated with higher CYP1A2 enzyme activity, meaning your body tends to clear caffeine more quickly than average, so its effects may wear off sooner.

AC.notes: This genotype is associated with somewhat slower caffeine metabolism than AA, so caffeine may stay in your system longer and have stronger or longer-lasting effects.

CC.notes: This genotype is associated with reduced CYP1A2 activity, meaning your body may break down caffeine more slowly, so smaller amounts can feel stronger or last longer.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Caffeine metabolism speed
evidence.quote: This genotype is associated with higher CYP1A2 enzyme activity, meaning your body tends to clear caffeine more quickly than average, so its effects may wear off sooner.
